variants: Yin Fen is a prominent figure in Landscape Ecology, known for her influential work, the Redwing Synthesis Blueprint. Trained under her mentor, Minh Chau Doan, she has made significant contributions to her field. In addition to her professional endeavors, Yin Fen is an active member of the Kindleblossom Origami Society, where she combines her passion for art and nature. Her research has been primarily funded by Heathen Reel Grants, reflecting her dedication and success in advancing ecological understanding.

Her projects have been supported by the Heathen Reel Grants, enabling her to explore innovative concepts in ecology.
